dataset_scraper_id_for_sync_scrape: Dataset scraper ID for sync scrape
describe_what_you_are_looking_for_e_g: Describe what you are looking for (e.g., "find official pricing pages and change notes")
enter_your_bright_data_api_token: Enter your Bright Data API token
fetch_the_content_of_a_single_web_page: Fetch the content of a single web page through Bright Data Web Unlocker, bypassing bot blocks and geo-restrictions. Use to read a page an agent cannot otherwise access.
find_web_pages_that_match_a_described_in: Find web pages that match a described intent using Bright Data Discover, optionally pulling page content. Use to gather sources on a topic without crafting exact queries.
include_page_content_in_discover_results: Include page content in discover results
integrate_bright_data_into_the_workflow_: Integrate Bright Data into the workflow. Scrape any URL with Web Unlocker, search Google and other engines with SERP API, discover web content ranked by intent, or trigger pre-built scrapers for structured data extraction.
json_array_of_url_objects_for_sync_scrap: JSON array of URL objects for sync scrape
json_array_of_url_objects_to_scrape: JSON array of URL objects to scrape
run_a_search_engine_query_through_bright: Run a search-engine query through Bright Data SERP API and return ranked results. Use for keyword research, competitive monitoring, or grounding an answer in fresh results.
scrape_websites_search_engines_and_extra: Scrape websites, search engines, and extract structured data
trigger_a_bright_data_pre_built_dataset_: Trigger a Bright Data pre-built dataset scraper for structured extraction across many URLs and retrieve the results. Use for bulk structured data from sites like e-commerce or social.
whether_sync_scrape_fell_back_to_async: Whether sync scrape fell back to async
